title: Verify user can successfully login with valid email and 8-character password
description: Validate that the minimum password length boundary of 8 characters allows successful authentication.
preconditions: User account exists with password of exactly 8 characters
User is on the login screen

steps.description: 1. Enter a valid email address in the email field
2. Enter a valid 8-character password in the password field

expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the app dashboard
